title: Sakamoto Days
sourceNotes: Cumulative episodes across Sakamoto Days S1 Cour 1 (11) + Cour 2 / Part 2 (11). Manga ongoing (current ch. ~260 as of May 2026). Anime adapted through ch ~75 (start of JCC Infiltration). Arc boundaries from Sakamoto Days Wiki / Deltia's arc guide.
